title: Q1 2026 Compliance Review Summary
body:
# Q1 2026 Compliance Review Summary

**Review Period:** January 1 – March 1, 2026
**Prepared by:** Legal & Compliance Officer
**Status:** Completed

---

## Executive Summary

TechCorp's Q1 2026 compliance review confirms that the company maintains strong compliance posture across all core operational areas. All scheduled reviews were completed on time with no critical findings or outstanding issues.

---

## Review Areas & Findings

### 1. Data Handling Practices
**Status:** ✓ COMPLIANT

- Customer data collection, storage, and retention procedures reviewed and confirmed to align with applicable privacy frameworks
- Data classification and access controls implemented as documented in our data governance policy
- Third-party vendor data handling agreements validated; all vendor certifications (SOC 2 attestations) current and on file
- No data handling incidents or breaches reported during Q1
- Recommendation: Continue quarterly vendor attestation reviews per standard practice

### 2. Access Control Audit
**Status:** ✓ PASSED

- Comprehensive access control audit completed across all systems and environments
- User role assignments reviewed and validated; no unauthorized access detected
- Privileged access management (PAM) controls functioning as designed
- Offboarding procedures confirmed effective; no orphaned accounts identified
- Recommendation: Schedule next access control audit for Q2 2026

### 3. Incident Response Readiness
**Status:** ✓ COMPLETED

- Incident response drill executed successfully on February 15, 2026
- All incident response team members participated; communication protocols validated
- Detection, escalation, and containment procedures tested and confirmed operational
- No critical gaps identified in response capabilities
- Findings documented in incident response drill report

### 4. Outstanding Items
**Status:** ✓ NONE CRITICAL

- All action items from prior compliance reviews have been closed
- No regulatory or internal compliance violations
